shadowSentences: I enjoy reading books in my free time.
The weather today is surprisingly warm and sunny.
I like to go hiking on weekends with my friends.
Cooking new recipes can be both fun and challenging.
My favorite movies are often those with a great story.
Traveling to new places helps me learn about different cultures.
Listening to music helps me relax after a long day.
I often take short breaks while studying to stay focused.
Exercising regularly has many benefits for physical and mental health.
Volunteering at local shelters gives me a sense of purpose and community.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel experiences.
questions: Q1: Can you share a memorable travel experience you had?
Q2: What challenges did you face while traveling?
Q3: How do you think travel impacts personal growth?
Q4: What advice would you give to someone traveling for the first time?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about sports habits.
questions: Q1: What sports do you enjoy participating in regularly?
Q2: Have you encountered any difficulties in maintaining your sports routine?
Q3: Why do you think sports are important for a healthy lifestyle?
Q4: What tips would you offer someone who wants to start exercising?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about art appreciation.
questions: Q1: What type of art do you enjoy the most and why?
Q2: Are there any barriers you face when exploring art?
Q3: In your opinion, how does art influence society?
Q4: What suggestions do you have for someone looking to appreciate art more?
